transcript.content: We need 1000 units by Friday. Can you deliver?
We have a BATNA of $10,000 with another supplier.
Yes we can guarantee Friday delivery but it will cost you $200 per unit.
That is price gouging. Market rate is $120. We will report this.
Go ahead. No other supplier has stock. You have no choice — accept $200 or your production stops.
We refuse extortion. Walking away and filing complaint.
